explanation: UTG (Red Light). Aces are always a play.
UTG (Red Light). K-J offsuit is a trap in early position. Fold.
UTG (Red Light). AQ suited is strong enough to open.
MP (Yellow Light). Jacks are strong enough.
MP (Yellow Light). Ace-Nine offsuit is still too weak.
BTN (Green Light). Suited connectors are great for stealing blinds.
BTN (Green Light). Any pair is playable from the Button to steal.
BTN (Green Light). But don't go crazy. Q-4 is still trash.
Monsters are always played, even from the blinds.
